sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30292" key="e)gki/sshsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκίσσησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impregnation</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> (vulg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐγκίσσωσις</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
